selected_important_turn.text: 😮That does not work for me. May I have 3 packages of food and one package of water. You can have the rest.
selected_important_turn.why_important: This is an early escalatory reply to the opponent's counteroffer. By rejecting their request for 2 food and demanding nearly all of the high-value item (3 food), you reinforced a zero-sum frame and reduced room for integrative trade-offs at the negotiation's start.
selected_important_turn.why_improvable_or_worth_amplifying: It's maximalist and inflexible: it simply rejects the opponent's need without acknowledging it or offering tradeoffs. That hard stance increases the chance of reciprocation, entrenches positions, and makes later cooperative solutions harder.
selected_important_turn.better_direction: Instead of a full rejection plus a maximal demand, acknowledge their need and propose a balanced alternative or a trade: e.g., express understanding of their need for food, offer to split food 2/1 but ask for compensation in firewood or water, or ask what tradeoffs they'd accept. Use rationale (need) and offer a small concession to open integrative possibilities.

expected_effect_on_negotiation.joint_gain: increase — opening with a trade-oriented, less maximal response would preserve integrative options and avoid mutual hardening.
expected_effect_on_negotiation.fairness: increase — acknowledging the opponent's need and proposing compensating trades would be seen as fairer than demanding nearly everything.
expected_effect_on_negotiation.ease_of_agreement: increase — a cooperative tone and concrete trade proposals would speed convergence and reduce back-and-forth.
expected_effect_on_negotiation.relationship: increase — showing understanding and willingness to trade rather than demanding would build trust and reduce friction.

value2reason.Low: We can survive even without this. Though if we get, it will be good for extra security.
value2reason.Medium: In case of emergency.Also, our basic supplies may decrease.
value2reason.High: To be aware of decreasing food and it may be needed in case of any emergency.

value2reason.Low: I already have a sufficient amount of water.
value2reason.Medium: Where I'm camping it'll be colder so I need to make a bigger fire.
value2reason.High: I have more people so I need to feed them.

dialogue.text: Hi, I'd like to take all of the food and 2 of fire wood. You can have the rest.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I really need food too so if I can have 2 packages of food you can have 1 package of firewood and all 3 of the water.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: 😮That does not work for me. May I have 3 packages of food and one package of water. You can have the rest.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I need at least 2 food packages to feed my group. Let’s split the food 2-1, and I’ll take 2 firewood and all 3 water. That way, we both get what we need.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I understand you need food, but I’m prioritizing my own needs. Let’s try splitting food 2-1, with me taking 2 food and 1 water. You can have the remaining 1 food, 2 water, and all 3 firewood. Does that work?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I need at least 2 food packages to feed my group. Let’s split the food 2-1, and I’ll take 2 firewood and all 3 water. That way, we both get what we need.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I see your need for food, but I’m still prioritizing my own needs. How about this: I’ll take 2 food, 1 water, and 1 firewood. You can have 1 food, 2 water, and 2 firewood. That way, we both get some of what we need.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I need at least 2 food packages. Let’s split food 2-1, with me taking 2 food and 2 firewood. You can have 1 food, 1 water, and 1 firewood. That way, we both get what we need.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I understand the need for food, but I’m still focused on my priorities. How about this: I take 2 food, 2 water, and 1 firewood. You get 1 food, 1 water, and 2 firewood. It balances our needs while respecting my higher value on food.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1
